import io
import string
import list

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn read_first_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut xs: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        xs = list.push(xs, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  xs
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_first_line()
  let line2 = read_first_line()

  let xs = parse_ints(line1)

  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  let total = xs.len()
  let limit = if k < total
    k
  else
    total
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = xs
  mut j = 0
  while j < limit
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(mx)
      result = list.push(result, mx)
      match list.index_of(remaining, mx)
      when Some(idx)
        remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut p = 0
  let rn = result.len()
  while p < rn
    match result.get(p)
    when Some(v)
      if p == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    p = p + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
